====Pokémon====
=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Ghetsis
|pkmn=Hydreigon
|gender=male
|type1=Dark
|type2=Dragon
|img=Ghetsis Hydreigon Adventures.png
|img_size=201px
|epnum=PS495
|epname=The Battle Within
|desc={{p|Hydreigon}} is Ghetsis's first known Pokémon. He was used by Ghetsis to fly to the [[Dragonspiral Tower]] so that he could meet and give the Dark Stone to N. He is shown to be very powerful, as he was able to easily defeat Black's entire team in a short amount of time. At N's Castle, he was used to battle Black, where his {{type|Fire}} moves gave him an advantage over Black's [[Tula]]. Eventually, he was defeated by an {{m|X-Scissor}} from Tula.

None of Hydreigon's moves are known and his [[Ability]] is {{a|Levitate}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Ghetsis
|pkmn=Eelektross
|type1=Electric
|img=Ghetsis Eelektross Adventures.png
|epnum=PS497
|epname=Finding Truth
|desc={{p|Eelektross}} is Ghetsis's second known Pokémon. It was first used by Ghetsis to attack and stun Black so that the Dark Stone could be easily taken from {{DL|Nacrene City|Nacrene Museum}}. At N's Castle, it was used to battle Black, where its {{type|Electric}} allowed it to gain an easy advantage over Black's {{p|Carracosta|Costa}} and {{p|Braviary|Brav}}. Eventually, it was defeated by a {{m|Flare Blitz}} from [[Bo]].

Eelektross's only known move is {{m|Discharge}}{{tt|*|revealed on an official site only}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Levitate}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Ghetsis
|pkmn=Seismitoad
|type1=Water
|type2=Ground
|img=Ghetsis Seismitoad Adventures.png
|epnum=PS521
|epname=Triple Threat
|desc={{p|Seismitoad}} was used alongside the other Seven Sages' Pokémon to fend off several Trainers that were trying to rescue the captured Gym Leaders. Later, it is one of the Pokémon Ghetsis used in his battle against Black at N's Castle. Its {{type|Water}} gave it an advantage over Black's Bo. Eventually, it was defeated by Musha's {{m|Hidden Power}}.

Seismitoad's only known move is {{m|Hydro Pump}}{{tt|*|revealed on an official site only}}, and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Swift Swim}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Ghetsis
|pkmn=Cofagrigus
|type1=Ghost
|img=Ghetsis Cofagrigus Adventures.png
|epnum=PS523
|epname=The Power of Dreams
|desc={{p|Cofagrigus}} is one of the Pokémon Ghetsis used in his battle against Black at N's Castle. Thanks to its {{type|Ghost}}, it easily had an advantage over Black's [[Musha]]. Eventually, it was defeated by Brav's {{m|Sky Drop}}.

None of Cofagrigus's moves are known.}}

None of Toxicroak's moves are known.}}

=====Status unknown=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Ghetsis
|pkmn=Volcarona
|type1=Bug
|type2=Fire
|img=Ghetsis Volcarona Adventures.png
|epnum=PS523
|epname=The Power of Dreams
|desc={{p|Volcarona}} is one of the Pokémon Ghetsis used in his battle against Black at N's Castle. Volcarona was found in the [[Relic Castle]], where it was later captured and eventually produced an Egg that hatched into the [[Shadow Triad]]'s {{p|Larvesta}}. Ghetsis used it to camouflage itself with the sun, allowing it to make Hydreigon's Fire-type attacks more powerful in secret. Eventually, it was found out when Black had Musha eat his dreams and then defeated by Costa's {{m|Stone Edge}}. Afterward, Ghetsis expressed disappointment in its easy defeat.

Volcarona did not appear in the {{MangaArc|Black 2 & White 2}}, thus leaving its current whereabouts unknown.

None of Volcarona's moves are known and its [[Ability]] is {{a|Flame Body}}.}}

=====Controlled=====
{{anchor|Kyurem 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|main=Tao trio (Adventures)
|trainer=Ghetsis
|pkmn=Kyurem
|type1=Dragon
|type2=Ice
|img=Ghetsis Kyurem Adventures.png
|img2=Black Kyurem Adventures.png
|epnum=PS536
|epname=Cold Storage Battle
|desc={{p|Kyurem}} was originally caught by [[Zinzolin]], but was taken control of by Colress with the Colress Machine. When N arrived to confront Team Plasma and put a stop to their plans, Colress gave Ghetsis the Colress Machine so he could use Kyurem in battle.}}
